description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a wooden fence and lush landscaping, including several mature trees and manicured bushes. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, white facade with large windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front of the property includes a paved driveway leading to a garage, with a pathway flanked by greenery guiding visitors to the main entrance. The backyard is spacious, featuring open grassy areas and additional trees, offering privacy and outdoor living space. The architectural style is minimalist, with straight lines and a focus on open, functional spaces. The property is well-integrated into its lot, with clear boundaries and a harmonious blend of built and natural elements.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and lush landscaping, enclosed by a wooden fence. Features a driveway, garage, and spacious front and back yards.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and dense landscaping with trees and bushes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden fence, side yard, and the bungalow's flat roof and white exterior.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional trees, and the open grassy area behind the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, fence, and the back of the garage with more greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
